prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of an anime elf girl with silver twin braids and green eyes. She has pale skin, pointed elf ears adorned with red drop earrings, and a calm, neutral expression as she looks slightly upward. She is wearing a white capelet with gold trim and red gems over a black and white striped shirt. The scene is set outdoors during the daytime with beautiful dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy of a large tree on the right, casting soft shadows on her face and clothes. She stands on a cobblestone path lined with green grass and small white flowers. To her left is a rustic wooden signpost with three directional planks bearing the text 北側諸国, グラナト山, and オイサースト. In the blurred background, a picturesque fantasy town with a castle sits on a lush green hill under a bright sky.
